title: ACT Index envelope
description: Per PRD-100-R16, PRD-100-R17, PRD-100-R18, PRD-100-R19. Wire shape of the index envelope (Core). NDJSON variant (Plus, PRD-100-R37): each line conforms to `$defs/IndexEntry` without the outer wrapper. Index entries carry summary-level metadata only — full `content` arrays are forbidden (PRD-100-R18). `additionalProperties` left at default (true) per PRD-108-R7.

etag.description: Index-level ETag. Stable function of the inputs defined by PRD-103.

id.description: PRD-100 ID grammar. UTF-8 byte-length MUST also be <= 256 (validator-enforced).

type.description: Open enum; well-known values listed in PRD-100. Custom types MUST be namespaced (e.g., `acme:foo`).

summary.description: Required at all conformance levels. SHOULD be <= 50 tokens (validator warning >100). PRD-100 cites gap E8.

etag.description: Per-node ETag. Per PRD-103: stable function of payload + identity + tenant for runtime; payload-only for static.
